notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman plunked

notableEvents.label: José Fermín GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Masyn Winn out at 2nd. José Fermín out at 1st.
